reasoning: FIDE publishes its official Elo rating lists on a monthly basis (on the 1st of each month). Therefore, the Wikipedia article 'FIDE rankings', which mirrors these top 20 lists, will not update Harika Dronavalli's Elo rating between March 15 and March 22. Her rating on both dates will reflect the March 1 list (2466). Since her rating on Wikipedia will remain unchanged, it cannot be 1% higher on March 22 than on March 15. Furthermore, even over a whole month, a rating increase of >24 points for an elite grandmaster is quite rare. Thus, the probability is extremely low.
